name: testCreateAcquirerWithDuplicateNameShowsError
description: Verify error appears when creating an Acquirer with a duplicate name.
descriptionHtml: Verify error appears when creating an Acquirer with a duplicate name.
statusMessage:
Locator expected to have attribute 'data-active': true Received: null Call log: - Locator.expect with timeout 5000ms - waiting for getByRole(AriaRole.LINK, new Page.GetByRoleOptions().setName("System administration")).locator("..") 2 × locator resolved to
